headline: Morgan Stanley resets Norwegian Cruise stock price target
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) is losing investor confidence as Morgan Stanley cuts its price target, and the stock has dropped 21% this year. Weaker booking momentum, pricing friction in key itineraries, and commercial execution issues are reshaping the earnings story. Morgan Stanley’s ...
